text:
There was a squirrel named Rufus. Every day he would hop around collecting berries wherever he could find them.

One day, Rufus saw a large oak tree full of acorns. He swarmed up onto a branch.

Suddenly, an eagle swooped down from above. The owl heard Rufus screech.

The owl flew down!

"I'm pretty good at squishing little critters."

The owl grabbed Rufus in her talons.

Rufus hadn helf screaming.

But the owl liked squirrels. She just didn't like scary ones.

She flew away with Rufus. She liked little creatures.

After a few days, she let Rufus go.

"You're kind of cute." She said.

Rufus chased berries for her.

That was an odd pair. But the owl liked them.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
